item.title: Ford 5.4 V8 Tear-Down with Car Wizard
item.description: Car Wizard takes a close look inside the Ford 5.4 V8, showing the teardown process and what mechanics can learn from it.

item.title: Simple Mistake Behind Door Issues

item.title: 6 SUVs to Skip Buying, per a Mechanic
